channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Quote of the day by Amazon CEO Andy Jassy: 'There is no compression algorithm for experience' — wisdom on avoiding shortcuts in life and business
item.description: At a time of heavy automation and job losses, enterprises must also consider how useful individuals with real, practical experience might be

item.title: How to watch Ecuador vs Curacao: Free Streams & TV Channels for FIFA World Cup 2026 as both sides seek first points
item.description: Here's how to watch Ecuador vs Curacao for free online and from anywhere as both sides fight to keep their World Cup 2026 hopes alive.

item.title: Signal’s Meredith Whittaker wants you to remember that AI chatbots ‘are not your friends’
item.description: "These are not your friends. These are not conscious beings. These are not sentient interlocutors.”

item.title: Already watched the Sugar season 2 premiere? Here are 3 more gritty Apple TV crime shows to satisfy your inner sleuth
item.description: Sugar season 2 is now streaming and there's more great crime shows where that came from.
